---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, certification track, or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of what you want.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you think this should work. Be as specific as you can.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Type of change

- [ ] New question(s) for an existing domain
- [ ] New certification track
- [ ] UI or UX improvement
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Developer tooling
- [ ] Something else

## Acceptance criteria

A checklist of conditions that would make this feature "done":

- [ ] ...
- [ ] ...

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to documentation, or anything else relevant.
